decisions.decision: SHIP V16-COMPOSITE + dictionary expansion DIRECTLY to the running app, bypass V17 harness verification (Task 3), regression tests (Task 4), and formal UAT (Task 5)
decisions.rationale: User chose live-test validation over harness gating: 'implement the changes or new prompts directly into the app and we keep the debugging log running and I just test it live'. Risk accepted because (a) dictionary expansion is deterministic and matrix already verified zero regressions in H9, (b) DEBUG_RECORDER captures raw ASR + LLM prompt + LLM raw + post-gate on EVERY cycle in both plain and AI modes so analysis is fully reconstructable, (c) rollback is trivial (git revert 0fc3198).

decisions.decision: Plain-mode logging contract holds for the live test
decisions.rationale: DEBUG_RECORDER's outer-scope write block in TextProcessingService.swift:224 (locked by 25-02's parity tests) emits records regardless of mode, so AI-mode cycles log both raw ASR (steps.raw.text) and final cleaned text (steps.post_gate.text) in the same record — exactly the comparison the user asked for

decisions.decision: Fixed pre-existing install-local.sh syntax bug (orphan ')' ;; on line 73) as side-effect of live install — committed separately in b17ed32
decisions.rationale: Blocked the script before stale-copy enumeration could run; trivial fix, isolated commit

decisions.decision: Recovered Developer ID Application: Moritz Wehrli (VTWHBCCP36) signing identity from 1Password TrueNAS vault (item sqn2j6zeygtpewb2v66expqxva, Certificates.p12) after find-identity returned empty — cert was on disk but private key missing post-wipe
decisions.rationale: Ad-hoc signing breaks TCC permission persistence; user flagged this as a recurring frustration. Memory feedback_developer_id_signing_recovery captures the recovery procedure so future sessions don't repeat the miss.

context_notes: Phase 25 took a discovery-driven pivot. Wave 1 (25-01 matrix + 25-02 logging) revealed (a) plain-mode logging was already live just unused, (b) dictionary substitution does ~90% of brand fixing not the LLM. Wave 2 was planned as a 5-task hybrid path (dict + prompt + V17 gate + tests + UAT) but the user chose to ship directly to the running Debug-Recorder app and validate via live capture instead. The shipped change set is conservative: dictionary expansion is deterministic and matrix-verified (H9 showed zero regressions), prompt change is H3+H4 only (skip H1 which regressed Dokploy, skip H5 which wasn't needed). The matrix.md addendum (§1b/§2.8/§2.9/§4/§5) remains the source of truth for any analytical question. Authoritative memories: project_dictionary_dominates_brand_fixing, project_v15_capture_findings, feedback_developer_id_signing_recovery (new this session).
